# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes: 
      - name: user-service-route
        paths: 
          - /users
    plugins: 
      - name: cors
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 1000
  - name: invoice-service
    url: http://invoice-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: invoice-service-route
        paths:
          - /invoices
    plugins: 
      - name: cors
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 1000
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /orders
    plugins: 
      - name: cors
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour: 1000
